_doc: Explicitly ignored interactive elements (NOT real actionable controls or third-party detail). Each needs reason + owner + expiry. The coverage gate subtracts these from the denominator; everything else discovered-and-enabled MUST be in controls.json or the gate FAILs. Keep this list small — it is an escape hatch, not a way to hide unmapped high-risk controls.

ignored.reason: search input inside the palette; routing is exercised via cmdk.item
generic drawer close affordance; covered implicitly by every drawer nav oracle's reset
